name: gbrain-rs-skills
description: Skills that are usable with the current gbrain_rs CLI/MCP surface

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Route text, links, notes, and meeting content to supported brain ingestion skills.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using gbrain_rs query, pages, graph, backlinks, and timeline.

skills.name: brain-ops
skills.description: Core read/write brain workflow using supported gbrain_rs tools.

skills.name: enrich
skills.description: Enrich person, company, concept, and source pages with links and timeline entries.

skills.name: idea-ingest
skills.description: Ingest links, articles, tweets, and ideas into brain pages.

skills.name: meeting-ingestion
skills.description: Ingest meeting transcripts with attendee pages, links, and timeline updates.

skills.name: artifact-review
skills.description: Unified knowledge workflow: write memories, upload files, query with source tracing, review suggested changes, manage artifacts via artifact_* facade.

skills.name: citation-fixer
skills.description: Audit and fix citation formatting across brain pages.

skills.name: repo-architecture
skills.description: Filing rules and directory conventions for new brain pages.

skills.name: daily-task-manager
skills.description: Maintain a task list as a brain page.

skills.name: reports
skills.description: Save and load timestamped reports as brain pages.

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Migrate Markdown, CSV, JSON, and other note exports into gbrain_rs-supported pages.

skills.name: kb-ops
skills.description: [INTERNAL] KB subsystem admin: manage libraries, documents, search profiles, health, backup/restore. Requires expose_internal_tools=true. For user-facing operations, use artifact-review skill.

skills.name: promotion
skills.description: [DEPRECATED] Use artifact-review skill instead. Promotion candidates are now 'suggested changes' via artifact_review_* tools.

skills.name: code-graph
skills.description: Code knowledge graph: find definitions, trace references, explore call graphs, search code chunks, reindex code pages.

skills.name: delete-restore
skills.description: Soft-delete lifecycle: delete pages safely, restore accidentally deleted pages, purge old deleted content.

skills.name: writing-mode
skills.description: Writing quality control: choose writing mode (Strict/Lint/Off), run lint checks, auto-fix quality issues.

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: Self-maintenance daemon and health diagnostics: autopilot, doctor, integrity, orphans, health monitoring.
